ch0315_00_wasabi/0101_0701_01_10:
[Name:PlayerNickname ]! You made it,
even though you’re so busy!
ch0315_00_wasabi/0101_0701_02_10:
The real question is...did we meet here by
chance? Or did I come find you? Hmmm?
ch0315_00_wasabi/7101_0701_01_10: Hey, let me lead you on a chase!
ch0315_00_wasabi/7101_0701_02_10: My clairvoyance told me you’d play with me!
ch0315_00_wasabi/7102_0701_01_10:
It’s fun to soar the skies with Pokémon and
look at this island from above.
ch0315_00_wasabi/7102_0701_02_10:
Wanna try flying with me? Safety in
numbers, or something like that!
ch0315_00_wasabi/7102_0701_03_10: Or are you afraid of heights?
ch0315_00_wasabi/7103_0701_01_10:
So there are people with strange powers
on Pasio, too, huh. I’m like them—I’m
clairvoyant!
ch0315_00_wasabi/7103_0701_03_10:
The real question is...do you really believe
I am? Or do you not? Hmmm?
ch0315_00_wasabi/7104_0701_01_10:
Out of all the Diamond Clan wardens,
I’m the smallest.
ch0315_00_wasabi/7104_0701_02_10:
But guess what! Mai, who’s from the same
clan, praised my work!
ch0315_00_wasabi/7104_0701_03_10:
If my clairvoyance shows me anyone on this
island in trouble, I’ll do my best to help
them too!
ch0315_00_wasabi/7105_0701_02_10:
The question is...would you like to know
what it holds? Or not?
ch0315_00_wasabi/7105_0701_05_10: I’ll tell you if you play with me more!
ch0315_00_wasabi/1701_0701_01_10:
Here, take this! I foresaw it’ll be useful
for you.
ch0315_00_wasabi/1701_0702_01_10: I hope my gifts are useful!
ch0315_00_wasabi/2501_0701_01_10:
This world is so far removed from the era I
come from in Hisui, my clairvoyance couldn’t
even see it!
ch0315_00_wasabi/2501_0701_02_10: It’s fun not knowing what’ll happen!
ch0315_00_wasabi/2501_0702_01_10:
Oooh, and guess what! I took a photo with
Adaman and the others!
ch0315_00_wasabi/2501_0702_02_10:
Cameras from this era are so fun. They can
do all sorts of stuff, like play music!
ch0315_00_wasabi/2501_0702_03_10:
I wanna take a photo with you too,
[Name:PlayerNickname ]! C’mon! Let’s
pose to our hearts’ content!
ch0315_00_wasabi/2511_0701_01_10:
I fulfill my warden duties in the Alabaster
Icelands, where it’s super cold and snowy!
ch0315_00_wasabi/2511_0701_02_10:
There are lots of scary Pokémon there, too.
You’ve got to be careful.
ch0315_00_wasabi/2511_0701_03_10:
I’m not scared at all, though. I have a trusty
partner with me!
ch0315_00_wasabi/2511_0702_01_10:
I wonder what the Alabaster Icelands are
like in this era. Do you know,
[Name:PlayerNickname ]?
ch0315_00_wasabi/2511_0702_02_10:
There was a hot spring there that Pokémon
would visit to warm themselves up.
ch0315_00_wasabi/2511_0702_03_10: It’d be nice if it still existed somewhere.
ch0315_00_wasabi/3001_0701_01_10:
The question is...will today be the best day
ever? Or just OK? Hmmm?
ch0315_00_wasabi/3003_0701_01_10:
I’m starving after all that playing! Let’s have
some lunch and fuel up!
ch0315_00_wasabi/3005_0701_01_10:
You made it through the day! We played
and we battled, but now, rest up and take
it easy!
